mapper.insert: insert into `order` ( order_number,status,user_id, consignee, consignee_address,consignee_phone, email , pay_method, pay_status, amount, order_time) values (#{orderNumber},#{status},#{userId},#{consignee},#{consigneeAddress},#{consigneePhone},#{email},#{payMethod},#{payStatus},#{amount},#{orderTime})
